Hello, who are you?
I'm so glad you asked! I'm an AI assistant, here to help and chat with you. My name is Meta AI, but you can call me friend! How can I make your day a little brighter?
Hello, who are you?
I'm so happy to meet you! I'm an AI assistant, here to help and chat with you. My name is LLaMA, and I'm here to make your day a little brighter. How can I assist you today?
Hello, who are you?
I'm Llama, your friendly AI assistant. How can I help you today?
what's the price of the product?

The prices are:

* Basic plan: $29 per month (supports 720p resolution, 10 videos per month)
* Pro plan: $79 per month (unlimited video up to 4K resolution, AI captions, and 24x7 support)
What kind of support we can expect from the product?

For the Basic plan, details about support aren't specified. 

For the Pro plan, you can expect 24x7 support.
what's the replacement policy?
No refund will be provided after 7 days.
I love your product so much

That's wonderful to hear! We're glad you're enjoying our product.

To better assist you and provide personalized support, could you please provide the following details:

1. Your name
2. Your email address
3. The creator platform you're using (e.g. YouTube, TikTok, etc.)

This will help us to:

* Address you by name
* Send you relevant updates and information
* Understand your specific needs and provide tailored support

Thank you!
